mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_note (user_id, topic_id, title, description, is_published, storage_type, is_missing_info, is_pass, is_deleted, md_file_size) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{isPublished}, #{storageType}, #{isMissingInfo}, #{isPass}, #{isDeleted}, #{mdFileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.topic_id, t.topic_name, n.title, n.description, n.is_published, n.storage_type, n.is_missing_info, n.is_pass, n.is_deleted, n.md_file_size, n.create_time, n.update_time FROM biz_note n LEFT JOIN biz_topic t ON t.id = n.topic_id WHERE n.id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, title, description, is_published, storage_type, is_missing_info, is_pass, is_deleted, md_file_size, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, title, description, is_published, storage_type, is_missing_info, is_pass, is_deleted, md_file_size, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND title = #{title} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.note_id AS id, m.note_title AS title, m.is_cross_user AS isCrossUser, n.is_published AS isPublished, m.is_deleted AS isDeleted, m.create_time AS createTime FROM biz_note_image_mapping m LEFT JOIN biz_note n ON n.id = m.note_id WHERE m.image_id = #{imageId} AND m.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_note SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE biz_note SET is_pass = #{isPass}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.topic_id, t.topic_name, n.title, n.description, n.is_published, n.storage_type, n.is_missing_info, n.is_pass, n.is_deleted, n.md_file_size, n.create_time, n.update_time FROM biz_note n LEFT JOIN biz_topic t ON t.id = n.topic_id
n.is_deleted = 0 AND (n.user_id = #{userId} OR n.is_published = 1) AND n.topic_id = #{topicId} AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
